zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Fairfax於大約1448年出生在英國越可爾吉爾林 卡素時，他的父親William Fairfax41歲，母親Katherine Neville I of Thornton Bridge22歲。他於1460年8月27日與Elizabeth Sherburne在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1505年3月31日在他的家鄉享年58歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾沃爾頓勒-達爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Fairfax于大约1448年出生在英国越可爾吉爾林 卡素时，他的父亲William Fairfax41岁，母亲Katherine Neville I of Thornton Bridge22岁。他于1460年8月27日与Elizabeth Sherburne在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1505年3月31日在他的家乡享年58岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾沃爾頓勒-達爾。

nameMeanings.name: Fairfax
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname for someone with beautiful long hair, from Middle English fair fax ‘beautiful tresses’. This was a common descriptive phrase in Middle English: the alliterative poem Sir Gawain and the Green Knight refers to ‘fair fanning fax’ encircling the shoulders of the doughty warrior.
History: Thomas Fairfax (1693–1781), an army officer from Leeds Castle, Kent, England, first came to VA in 1735 and settled on maternal estates there as a proprietor in 1747.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Fairfax was born about 1448, in Gilling Castle, Yorkshire, England, his father, William Fairfax, was 41 and his mother, Katherine Neville I of Thornton Bridge, was 22. He married Elizabeth Sherburne on 27 August 1460, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 31 March 1505, in his hometown, at the age of 58, and was buried in Walton-le-Dale, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Fairfax est né environ 1448, à Gilling Castle, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, William Fairfax, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Katherine Neville I of Thornton Bridge, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Sherburne le 27 août 1460, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 31 mars 1505, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Walton-le-Dale, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Fairfax um 1448 in Gilling Castle, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Fairfax 41 und seine Mutter Katherine Neville I of Thornton Bridge 22. Er hat am 27. August 1460 in Yorkshire, England Elizabeth Sherburne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 31. März 1505 im Alter von 58 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Walton-le-Dale, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Fairfax è nato il circa 1448 nel Gilling Castle, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, William Fairfax, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Katherine Neville I of Thornton Bridge, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Sherburne il 27 agosto 1460, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 31 marzo 1505, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a Walton-le-Dale, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Fairfaxが約1448年にイギリスヨークシュアイアギリング カストルで生まれた時，父William Fairfaxは41歳，母Katherine Neville I of Thornton Bridgeは22歳であった。1460年8月27日にイギリスヨークシュアイアでElizabeth Sherburneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1505年3月31日に故郷で58歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアワルトン-レ-ダルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Fairfax(이)가 대략 1448년 영국 요르크실르 길링 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Fairfax(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine Neville I of Thornton Bridge(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1460년 8월 27일 영국 요르크실르에서 Elizabeth Sherburne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1505년 3월 31일 그의 고향에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 월토-레-데일에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Fairfax nasceu aproximadamente 1448, em Gilling Castle, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Fairfax, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Neville I of Thornton Bridge, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Sherburne em 27 de agosto de 1460, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 31 de março de 1505, em sua cidade natal, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Walton-le-Dale, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Fairfax родился около 1448 г. в местности джиллинг кастл, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Fairfax было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Katherine Neville I of Thornton Bridge, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Sherburne 27 августа 1460 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Он умер 31 марта 1505 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности валтон-ле-деил, ланкашир, Англия.

Se casó con Elizabeth Sherburne el 27 de agosto de 1460, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 31 de marzo de 1505, en su pueblo, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en Walton-le-Dale, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
